receipts.input_contract: Stage adapters must pass explicit stage_id/run_id/run_number before alpha MT5 materialization.
receipts.output_contract: Shared alpha helpers expose no Stage10 default identity and fail closed when identity is missing.
receipts.artifact_or_report_effect: Branch packet captures code surface and closeout evidence for merge readiness.
receipts.monolith_risk: medium: stage_pipelines support files remain near the attention threshold but cross-stage reuse is now blocked by audit.
receipts.placement_decision: Reusable identity and MT5 materialization helpers stay in foundation/alpha; stage-local orchestration stays in stage_pipelines/stageXX.

receipts.flow_contract_checked: Stage wrappers import stage-local orchestration, stage-local orchestration configures identity, shared alpha helpers require configured identity before writing artifacts.
receipts.test_intent: Run targeted unit tests for Stage10 identity/materialization, code surface audit, and stage pipeline import smoke coverage.
receipts.residual_quality_risk: Default Python 3.7 full discovery still has pre-existing environment gaps such as missing skl2onnx and str.removeprefix in one test fixture.

invariant_checks: stage_pipelines is stage-local execution orchestration, not a shared toolbox
foundation/alpha must not carry Stage10 default run identity
control_plane must not import stage pipelines directly
stage_pipelines/stageXX must not import another stage_pipelines/stageYY
receipts.placement_boundary: Common reusable code belongs under foundation/* owner modules; stage_pipelines owns only stage-specific execution adapters.
receipts.architecture_debt_effect: Stage11 and Stage12 support files remain large but are now guarded by code-surface audit and cross-stage import blocking.

receipts.reference_need: Local repository reference only; no external API or time-sensitive third-party behavior was needed.
sources_checked_or_not_required_reason: existing work packet and receipt schemas
receipts.version_sensitive_surface: No external version-sensitive dependency was changed.
receipts.implementation_effect: Patch follows existing local control-plane audit and packet patterns instead of introducing a new policy system.
